name: Barbell Underhand Bent-Over Row
shortDescription: Row performed bent over with barbell and an underhand (supinated) grip, targeting lats and biceps.
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, grasp the barbell with a supinated (underhand) grip. Bend forward at the hips keeping your back flat, bar hanging from extended arms. Pull the bar towards your lower ribs, squeezing shoulder blades, then lower it until arms are straight.
steps: Stand with feet hip-width apart, barbell on floor.
Bend forward from hips, back straight, grasp bar underhand.
Let bar hang at arm’s length below shoulders.
Row barbell to torso, elbows close to sides.
Lower barbell under control to starting position.
breathing: Exhale as you row up, inhale as you lower down.
